programme.title: Lopez vs Lopez S3

programme.title: Hotel Costiera

programme.desc: When a snow day cancels school, Adam and Barry discover Murray has a fear of snow. When the boys realize this, they exploit his weakness and take advantage of him. programme.title: A Dog Year
programme.desc: A 50-something writer in a mid-existential crisis impulsively adopts a collie. The bond between him and the dog transforms in meaningful, unexpected ways.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Max takes a driving test to renew his licence, but when a disguised Zombozo hijacks the role of instructor, Ben becomes an alien to stop the evil clown and save their family road trip.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As Team Tennyson leaves the Frozen Man Festival, Lord Decibel takes centre stage to threaten the festival-goers, vowing to create an avalanche if his ransom isn't paid.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen spend the day volunteering at Repto Ranch and come face-to-face with King Koil. They need to overcome their fear of snakes quickly if they are to defeat the slithery baddie.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: With the Rustbucket stopped on the Midwest roadside, Ben locks himself inside with his tablet as Max and Gwen enjoy the great outdoors, until Team Tennyson is pulled into a wild Jack-a-Lope chase.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While on a tour at a space museum, Ben's excitement multiplies when he learns that some recently discovered 'space stuff' is being examined inside the museum's lab.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: During a trip to the Lake of the Ozarks, Ben and Gwen squabble over Ben's 'half-birthday' celebration, but when Max gets word of a suspicious rockslide, the cousins must put aside their differences.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Left to entertain himself as Max takes a well-deserved nap, Ben stumbles upon a Xingo arcade game and goes OE-Shock Rock to power it up, but it, unfortunately, receives too much juice.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While Gwen listens to a lecture on the Transcontinental Railroad, Ben sneaks away to the gift shop. When the Bounty Hunters appear and corner Ben, Gwen must use what she learnt to help him escape.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As Max attempts to get Ben and Gwen to the Four Corners Monument before sunset, an ominous fog bank engulfs the roadway and forces Max to drive at a snail's pace.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After Ben gets too much publicity for his alien-antics in Fort Knox, a jealous Gwen feels unappreciated and looks to ease her pain with ice cream. She is soon confronted by Charmcaster.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After a lull in alien antics, Ben suggests to Max and Gwen that he might be a better hero if he went solo. Vilgax enlists the help of Zombozo to build a giant hypno-mechanism to mesmerise the world.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While Max and Gwen revel in the holiday spirit of Winter Wonderland, Ben couldn't be more unamused and focussed on the toys. The Weatherheads set their sights on Winter Wonderland.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Ben and Max get into an argument and Ben goes Heatblast.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When Ben stumbles upon a video of Cannonbolt ripping up a computer lab on the internet, Team Tennyson must race to State U to find the imposter. Ben discovers it is a steam-punk version of his alien.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Gwen and Ben compete to see who can spot more birds first while birdwatching at Pinnacles National Park. A forest fire interrupts their fun and Team Tennyson must hurry to save the bird population.

programme.title: The Butterfly Effect
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher alters the past in the hope of transforming his future with childhood sweetheart Amy Smart, only to disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Justice League: Crisis on Infinite Earths - Part Two

programme.title: Batman

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: A kid has the ability to turn into Shazam, an adult superhero. But he needs to master his powers quickly to fight the deadly forces of evil.

programme.title: Get Out

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: An endearing American family is pitted against a terrifying and uncanny opponent: doppelgängers of themselves.

programme.title: Downsizing
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, a couple decides to ditch their stressed out lives and downsize to live large in a luxurious community.

programme.title: Frequency
programme.desc: A cop discovers that he can communicate through time with his dead father. But in doing so, the very fabric of reality is disrupted.

programme.desc: Three neighbors uncover a hidden fortune in stolen art only to become trapped in a sadistic game of survival set by a suspected serial killer.

programme.desc: A rich family's son falls in love with a woman who will only marry him once he becomes a Kung-Fu Master. In this 'Dramedy' He becomes a legendary hero, by attempting to save the emperor, during his true quest of love.

programme.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-thePooh, Piglet, Owl, and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: Brothers in Heaven
programme.desc: Twin brothers separated at birth grow up on opposite sides of the law. Twenty years after they were separated, they meet again, one as a cop while the other as a high rank criminal

programme.title: Cz12

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Naledi: A Baby Elephant's Tale
programme.desc: Naledi follows the journey of a baby elephant orphaned in a rescue camp, as the man tasked with her survival races to protect an entire species while fighting to save her life.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Cheese Master Afrim Pristine begins his cheese expedition in the Alpine country of Switzerland, home of iconic classics like Gruyere and holey Swiss Emmental.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Eating cheese is a national pastime in France. Here, Afrim uncovers the rich histories of cheesemaking across the country from Paris to Normandy.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim takes in the cheesy traditions of la belle province, Quebec, where family fromageries’ traditions have been passed on through generations.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the drama of the 'Son of Sam' murders, presented the way the events were covered at the time.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence examines existential threats to the worlds biosphere and what it means for the future of the planet, and Aotearoa.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence explores a future where bio-threats present one of the greatest existential risks that humanity has ever faced. From viruses to man-made pandemics and synthetic bio-weapons, technology is accelerating the risks of man-made threats.

programme.title: Gameplay: The Story of the Videogame Revolution
programme.desc: Gameplay is a feature on the history of videogames. From Pong to Pac Man, Super Mario to Lara Croft, Doom, Grand Theft Auto and beyond, we chronicle the remarkable story of the fastest evolving new media of all time.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: Now we know why Crypto is such a big deal, through this episode we’ll meet the family behind one of NZ’s biggest Crypto success stories. We’ll dispel some crypto myths and cover the basics of how to get on board.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: CEO Aaron McDonald and Co-Founder Brooke Howard-Smith tell us how they created a multi-million dollar NFT business here in Aotearoa and are collaborating with international superstars.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: It's an inspirational episode, we spend time with the team taking Māori to the metaverse and check-in on a couple of local disrupters focused on making digital worlds where everyone feels like they can belong.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: What if Bitcoin mining could actually save the world? Over this episode, we meet the local company on a mission to use it to help solve global warming.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: We profile Kaye-Maree Dunn, an innovator developing digital data sovereignty and we find out how NFTs can allow us to own our own artificial intelligence. It's an episode that will blow your mind.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: The Story of Playstation
programme.desc: With video-games on the rise, Sony, the tech superpower would attempt a collaboration with Nintendo. After a shocking betrayal, Sony founded what would become the world’s most successful chain of video game consoles. The Playstation was here to stay.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Brad Pitt: Breaking Hollywood
programme.desc: He may be one of the sexiest Hollywood actors, but his career and personal goals offer much more than his looks. Brad Pitt. One of the leading names in all of Hollywood. The well-known story of an unknown talent who transformed into a superstar.

programme.title: Tom Hanks: The Nomad
programme.desc: From humble beginnings to an aspiring thespian to acting as some of the world’s most iconic and notable characters. He has picked up a reputation as ‘America’s Nice Guy’, ’The Everyman’ and a nomad of the arts. But we all know him… as Tom Hanks.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: See ancient sea caves, modern golf courses, mysterious formations, and treacherous predators along Africa's South Coast.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: View South Africa's mountain ranges, bustling cities and untamed wildlife from the air. This is South Africa's journey from pre-human skeletons to modern Skyscrapers.

programme.title: Gameplay: The Story of the Videogame Revolution
programme.desc: Gameplay is a feature on the history of videogames. From Pong to Pac Man, Super Mario to Lara Croft, Doom, Grand Theft Auto and beyond, we chronicle the remarkable story of the fastest evolving new media of all time.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: Now we know why Crypto is such a big deal, through this episode we’ll meet the family behind one of NZ’s biggest Crypto success stories. We’ll dispel some crypto myths and cover the basics of how to get on board.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: CEO Aaron McDonald and Co-Founder Brooke Howard-Smith tell us how they created a multi-million dollar NFT business here in Aotearoa and are collaborating with international superstars.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The two oldest rhinos are set to be released back into the wild. Three rhinos cause a stir as they go missing, while the younger rhinos make steady progress toward health and happiness.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren continues his food trail along South Africa’s Cape Coast, stopping off at the township of Khayelitsha, home to some inspiring micro-farming initiatives, before arriving at Grootbos Private Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the Cape Winelands, where he tastes a variety of local wines including Pinotage, a signature South African red, and Ratafia, a unique and complex fortified wine.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Tswalu Nature Reserve, in the heart of the Kalahari Desert. Warren then meets with acclaimed Chef Marnus to cook up some exciting South African delicacies.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the coastal city of Durban - where he’s staying at the iconic Oyster Box hotel.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: In Durban, Warren visits the famous restaurant Max’s Lifestyle for an indulgent Shisa Nyama experience, before meeting with local guide Thoko to visit a nearby Zulu village.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders

programme.desc: Ceo, Akila, and Brian must demonstrate they make a great team so Khepra doesn’t split them up.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods

programme.title: Dragons: Defenders of Berk

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss and family go on Spring Break to visit his grandparents in the big city of Chicago. Boss uses the trip to test his business mettle, by getting in a promotion war at a real big adult company. And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. Convinced he's the victim of a conspiracy, Boom leaves a wake of parent worry in his path, forcing Boss to stop him.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After George and Harold T.P. the entire school with toilet paper, they are forced to flush it all down the toilet causing a giant explosion that turns the French teacher into the T.P. Mummy

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.desc: Po and the Kids are once more waylaid, this time by Mole Rats who have deemed Bao their god. But when Bao isn't able to defeat the mythical creature plaguing the Wasteland, Fan Tong steps up to save the day.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: Po and the Kids finally arrive in the Forbidden City. After an assassination scare, Xiao enlists Po and the 4Cs for help protecting her during her father's funeral.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: Po and the Kids agree to escort a dirigible shipment of food to a drought-torn region of China. But Nu Hai has some suspicions about Shi Long, which she finds aren't far off when she discovers the dirigible is set to explode...with them on board!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After the events at Gattos Keep Blinky is transformed into a human being and Jim discovers the assassin that is hunting him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: While Jim and Toby search for dates to the Spring Dance the team searches for the Second Triumbric Stone in the marshlands of the Quagawumps.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim is unavailable to do a simple Trollhunter task Toby and Claire take on the responsibility to prove they can carry their weight... literally.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: An exciting two-part episode of connected mini-stories following the crew that ends with Silent But Deadly and Thora deactivating a stink bomb.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Smoove ditches the crew and gets trapped in a clubhouse; the crew goes to ridiculous lengths to beat each other in a radio station contest.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald and Cheryl accidentally swap bodies. After Archibald gives them a parting gift, he unknowingly changes their course in history.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Jimmy pretends to be LarryBoy so he can be famous/Larry imagines that he's a train conductor but Motato and his radishes want to take over the train

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells a tale about unicorns sailing in ships on clouds in search of Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries

programme.title: Go Dog Go!

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart
programme.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. With time, she accepts him as a family; he always takes her side and loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S3)
programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

programme.title: My Amish Double Life
programme.desc: By day Emma is a good Amish girl, but by night she sneaks out with her friend and together they lead a double life. When she witnesses a murder while out, her life and community are thrown into peril.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl discovers her daughter Lauren is missing. Despite Cheryl's efforts to seek help from authorities and the media, her pleas are overshadowed by the attention given to the missing white girl's case.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: After a dreamy night on the train, the Earth-Cleaning Bros hit the road again, uplifted by Mongolia’s stunning scenery. But suddenly, Seok-hoon asks the driver to stop. Why?

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: The Caputos are briefly all under the same roof for the first time in weeks. Theresa visits her cousins in Rehoboth Beach for an impromptu vacation in between tour stops.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the "ghost flip", a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Australian Chef of the Year, Hugh Allen, is back in the MasterChef kitchen to set a pressure test with his ‘Banksia Pod’ dessert.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings together Southern and Indian flavours with her black-eyed pea biryani. She sautés the peas with vegetables, spices and coconut milk, then bakes it with rice.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea. With their daughter Sarah guiding them, they are ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a well-rounded meal of a French-cut rack of lamb, baked with Dijon mustard and seasoned breadcrumbs, and a side dish of brown and wild rice with porcini mushrooms and sautéed spinach.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to cook hot honey chicken, a simple and enjoyable dish made with seasoned chicken thighs, which she serves with charred corn on the cob.

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S4)
programme.desc: Two heavy hitting cereal rivals duke it out for breakfast dominance. Competition heats up when an idea is stolen, beaten to the market, and is a runaway success.

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S4)
programme.desc: The top-selling candy days of the year revolve around Easter, Valentine's Day, and Halloween. And it all started with a few bold pioneers.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: All over the world, there are giant monoliths that our ancient ancestors carved out of solid rock. But what was the purpose of these huge stone monuments? Did they serve some kind of ritual function?

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: A vast majority of these strange and disturbing incidents take place in the same locations on Earth. Is it possible that extraterrestrial spacecraft are visiting Earth at so-called 'UFO Hot Spots'?

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo (S1)
programme.desc: From a Chinese curse that turns out to be real to human remains in a Founding Father's basement. We uncover some of the world's most dangerous and deadly accidental discoveries.

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S4)
programme.desc: Two heavy hitting cereal rivals duke it out for breakfast dominance. Competition heats up when an idea is stolen, beaten to the market, and is a runaway success.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: All over the world, there are giant monoliths that our ancient ancestors carved out of solid rock. But what was the purpose of these huge stone monuments? Did they serve some kind of ritual function?

programme.title: Alone (S11)
programme.desc: The call of home grows stronger as the harsh realities of remote Arctic living set in for some participants. One survivalist finally gets their chance at big game, while another is caught off guard.

programme.title: Saudin: The Orangutan Whisperer
programme.desc: Saudin: The Orangutan Whisperer, is based on a true story of Saudin Bin Labutau. In 1936, Saudin became the first descendent of a Murut headhunter to travel to New York.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick takes a trip down the rabbit hole after a seller hops in with a first edition of "Alice's Adventures in Wonderland." Can it make Rick grin like the Cheshire Cat, or drive him mad?

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: New, ground-penetrating radar reveals that a number of mysterious objects may be buried deep inside of the Mesa.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: An ambitious upstart leaves Wall Street to start an internet store that becomes a global empire, while a young computer programmer revolutionises the way we buy and sell online.

programme.title: History's Deadliest with Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: From drug kingpins and serial killers to pirates, assassins, and murderous con men, these are the criminals whose bloody legacies earn them a spot among 'History's Deadliest'.

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: From the destructive Viking axe, to the sacred but deadly Samurai katana, razor sharp blades wielded by fearsome warriors have spilt blood and forged empires.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: Burdened by a string of bad luck, the remaining participants find their chances of success begin to slip away. One survivalist addresses a ruined shelter, while another must find a way to avoid starvation.

programme.title: Life Gamble
programme.desc: Martial arts master Yu has retired for years but is invited to join force with another master Tao to fight against the four famous thieves and retrieve the stolen Dragon Jade. However, Tao’s real plan is to possess the treasure himself and kills Yu after he defeats the thieves...

programme.title: The Brotherhood of Rebel
programme.desc: Chai, a triad member, helps his childhood friend Meow flee Hong Kong after discovering that Meow attempted to kill his triad boss. 17 years later, Chai becomes a key member of the triad. When he runs into Meow one day, he knows that his gang will kill Meow if they find him. Caught between triad and brotherhood, what will Chai choose?

programme.title: Come Drink with Me
programme.desc: The brother of the mystery swordswoman "Golden Swallow” is kidnapped. She joins forces with a beggar “Drunken Cat” who is skilled in martial arts to free her brother from a Buddhist monastery run by a corrupt abbot. The film was selected as Hong Kong’s entry for the Best Foreign Language Film at the 39th Academy Awards.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Heroes of Sung
programme.desc: Heroes Of Sung stars one of the original kung fu ladies of the silver screen, Shih Szu, who plays swordswoman Meng Hung. She must work with Fan Tien-Fu, played by Lo Lieh to find and protect the royal seals of the Sung Dynasty. Shih's magnificent performance earned her the female hero role in another hit Dracula And The 7 Golden Vampires.

programme.title: Lonely Eighteen
programme.desc: Set in the 1980s Hong Kong, Elaine and her best friend Ying enter the entertainment industry hoping to change their fates from poverty. Ying soon becomes a popular porn star but Elaine is lost between being her true self and an actress. When show business declines after a decade, their choices lead them to two different paths in life.

programme.title: YUM Investigation
programme.desc: YUM is a detective agency that handles supernatural cases. As YUM investigates the evil spirits appearing in an old building, they discover that the spirits are created by a spirit master to haunt the residents so that the building can be vacated for redevelopment. Can the YUM investigators finally find ways to fight against the master?

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: After many years as a respected actor and action choreographer, the Shaw Studio finally gave the dependable and commendable Hsu Hsia a chance to direct his own movies. He didn't waste the opportunity, inviting three other kung-fu designers to help on this fight-filled thriller. Wang Yu, co-star of such classics as Dirty Ho and The Kid With A Tattoo, here takes center stage as a young rascal caught between an anti-Ching Confederation and violent, vengeful Ching troops. But when he discovers that the good guys are led by master martial arts actor Jen Shih-kuan and the bad guys are led by the incredible Huang Cheng-li everyone knows that loads of great kung-fu is in store.

programme.title: A Writer's Odyssey II
programme.desc: Struggling novelist Lu Kong Wen succumbs to a powerful temptation, plunging both himself and his fictional characters into an inescapable crisis. By rediscovering his purpose, he joins forces with his creations to heroically resolve a catastrophe that threatens both their worlds.

programme.title: The King Boxer
programme.desc: This tale of a honorable fighter's retraining in the "Iron Palm" style, that became the first international martial arts movie hit and made a continent-spanning star of Lo Lieh.

programme.title: Vital Signs
programme.desc: Paramedic Wang partners with Ma after being reassigned to a new station. Initially, Wang disagrees with Ma’s unconventional methods, but over time, Ma helps him rediscover the true mission of a paramedic - saving every life.

programme.title: The Swift Knight
programme.desc: The Ming Emperor is dying with no heir to succeed the throne. His brother recalls that he has an illegitimate child with a court lady years ago and palace guards are sent to search for the heir. When the Emperor's nephew hires assassins to kill the child so he can be the successor, the Swift Knight comes to the rescue…

programme.title: The 36th Chamber of Shaolin
programme.desc: Gordon Liu plays an anti-Manchu rebel who escapes to the Shaolin Temple and learns what it truly takes to become a martial arts master by challenging the 35 Shaolin Kung Fu chambers, eventually creating the 36th chamber himself.

programme.title: Ang Probinsyano
programme.desc: FPJ is an honest policeman from the province who has just been transferred to the big city. He's being "promdi" makes him the butt of many humiliating jokes. Angered and challenged, he retaliates by working extra hard, and in the end proving that his being probinsyano is not the gauge to his true worth.

programme.title: Duplikado
programme.desc: One look. Two people. One name. Two destinies. Fate separated them on the very day they were born.

programme.title: Okey Si Ma'am
programme.desc: Keempee, Donna, Paco and Lander played high school senior students each having their own personal dilemmas. Ms. Sonia (Alice Dixson), with her unorthodox way of teaching became their counselor and friend who brought out the best in her students.

programme.title: Ngayon at Kailanman
programme.desc: Ayra (Sharon Cuneta), an heiress who came home to bury her dead father and who later discovered that her family's estate had been taken over by Edwin (Richard Gomez), her childhood sweetheart and the son of their former overseer.

programme.title: Bikini Watch (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: It's a wild and funny tale of action and romance as they encountered a mischievous group of hunks who were out to destroy the beach.

programme.title: Bangkay mo Akong Hahakbangan
programme.desc: Join the King of Stunts, Dante Varona, on this deadly game on hide and seek and of vengeance and justice.

programme.title: Zacarias
programme.desc: The movie depicted a different kind of action picture which included hard action scenes with touches of comedy. The action hero was waging a tough war against corruption, oppression and syndicated crime.

programme.title: P.S. I Love You
programme.desc: A failed romance in the past between her mother and his father threatened the budding relationship between Sharon and Gabby, in this film, which was the very first movie produced by Viva Films.

programme.title: Bikining Itim
programme.desc: Before Sally (Vivian Velez) leaves for Japan, she bequeaths Andoy (Joey Marquez) her black bikini to remind him of her absence, that is, in spite of his little dalliance with Tina (Cristina Gonzales).

programme.title: Paano ba ang Magmahal?
programme.desc: Jun (Niño Muhlach) feels neglected as his parents do not have time for him. He leaves home and ends up staying with Dodie (Aga Muhlach). With Dodie, Jun finds the attention and love he wants. But all ends well as it turns out that Dodie's girlfriend is Millet (Pops Fernandez) who also happens to be the niece of Josie's colleague, Ramon (Dante Rivero).

programme.title: Pandoy... Alalay ng Panday
programme.desc: In Pandoy, Joey De Leon gave a comic twist to the popular "Panday," a fictional action hero popularized by the King himself, Fernando Poe, Jr.

programme.title: Beloved (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Friendship took a violent turn when Nora Aunor found herself a pawn in the intriguing games, being played by her close friend and employer, Hilda Koronel. How far would the bounds of friendship go?

programme.title: Habang nasasaktan, Lalong Tumatapang
programme.desc: The dream of a beautiful future together by two orphans came crushing down when Mario was mistaken for a bank robber and was sent to jail.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Café Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the café cat-friendly

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are observing a pair of mountain goats when a sudden avalanche strikes. // Farmer Al finds mysterious crop circles in his corn field, he calls on the Paw Patrol to find out more.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora helps Benny and Uni the Unicornasaurus get their magic paintbrush back so he can be reunited with his pet, Bunnicorn. // Dora teams up with Hearty the Grumple so she can finally compete in the Grumple Games.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: After La Reina and Swiper's bodies were switched by Big Red Chicken's magic, Dora and Boots help them switch back!

programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos' archeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the creature that may have taken it. // Mayor Humdinger pretends to break his toe in order to win a race, so the pups build him a mobility device.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Travelling Travis is on another great adventure when he lands in Antarctica but believes he's actually on Mars. // Mr. Porter and Alex go on a sightseeing hike but get trapped inside a huge maze! The Paw Patrol has to find the maze and their friends!

programme.desc: The pups must help salmon get to the ocean and also need to rescue Alex who gets stuck on top of a dam.

programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: ER S1 10
programme.desc: The ER goes from completely empty to jammed beyond capacity during a snowstorm that caused a 32-car pileup. Hathaway announces her engagement to Taglieri.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 7
programme.desc: At Uncle Philip's insistence, Will joins his prep school's poetry club, and he enlists Geoffrey's help when he must present a "poet" for a reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 4
programme.desc: The Impractical Jokers, Sal, Joe, Murr and Q meet after the show to talk about their favorite moments during the show not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous. It is a chance for the viewers to hear about all the behind the scenes mishaps and awkward scenes as well as see outtakes never seen before.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 12
programme.desc: Jane & the FBI investigate the death of a high-tech cartographer, who may have unearthed a spy ring before he died. Meanwhile, Rigsby & Van Pelt discover an alarming conspiracy.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 9
programme.desc: The score of a lifetime is hidden in the back of what already appears to be a great locker, but when the bidding heats up, will our auction heroes have the cash to stay in this game? But first, Brandon and Lori face a shocking discovery when the contents of what look like an old retail store reveal their true identity. And later, some rare antiques fetch a fair price but further exploration of a hidden whale tusk could mean a windfall for one lucky storage hunter.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 1
programme.desc: Old rivals unite when Brandon and Jesse are faced with the unthinkable: join forces or stand alone to gamble on a once-in-a-lifetime locker. Then, a vintage motorcycle and rare car parts create big cash for one of our slickest auction heroes. And later, the Taylor Brothers are in for the fight of their lives when they leave the Deep South for the promise of California gold. It's an old-world battle that could lead to a new world order.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 15
programme.desc: Howard gets unsettling news amidst the excitement of the comic-book store reopening, and Penny doesn't practice what she preaches.

programme.title: Friends S7 18
programme.desc: Joey overreacts at a daytime drama awards show. Ross sees Chandler leaving a male strip club.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 9
programme.desc: Let freedom ring, as World's Dumbest presents "Only in America." Featuring 20 of the most patriotic patriots in the land - from a cop's strange take on the national anthem, to a dangerous mishap with a bald eagle, and the most insane thank you to thetroops ever put on film. Plus awesome commentary from our cast of America's best comics, including Brendon Walsh, Kevin McCaffrey and Jaime Andrews.

programme.title: ER S1 10
programme.desc: The ER goes from completely empty to jammed beyond capacity during a snowstorm that caused a 32-car pileup. Hathaway announces her engagement to Taglieri.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 15
programme.desc: Howard gets unsettling news amidst the excitement of the comic-book store reopening, and Penny doesn't practice what she preaches.

programme.title: Friends S7 18
programme.desc: Joey overreacts at a daytime drama awards show. Ross sees Chandler leaving a male strip club.

Then, a vintage motorcycle and rare car parts create big cash for one of our slickest auction heroes. And later, the Taylor Brothers are in for the fight of their lives when they leave the Deep South for the promise of California gold. It's an old-world battle that could lead to a new world order.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 12
programme.desc: Jane & the FBI investigate the death of a high-tech cartographer, who may have unearthed a spy ring before he died. Meanwhile, Rigsby & Van Pelt discover an alarming conspiracy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 1
programme.desc: Posing as a technician, Michael literally "gets the bug out" of a customer's phone and has him convinced it was in there all along. Then, as a seemingly ordinary bartender, he makes patrons fall for a never-ending beer bottle and a shot that breaks the laws of physics. Plus, he infiltrates an office and has gullible coworkers believing that he can freeze-dry animals and reanimate them.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 2
programme.desc: Posing as a cashier, Michael makes a shopper's face appear on a milk carton and tries to convince her that she really is a missing person. Then, in a shipping store he has customers believing that impossible technology of the future has arrived, likea bowling ball that can be mailed in a flat box. Plus, he has a hotel guest questioning her identity when he swaps her ID, and stumps a valet when he does a disappearing act from his car.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 16
programme.desc: An experiment designed to make people fall in love piques Penny and Leonard's interest. Meanwhile, Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily encounter a "zombie."

programme.title: Friends S7 19
programme.desc: Monica's gorgeous cousin (DENISE RICHARDS) unwittingly wreaks havoc on Chandler and Ross. Rachel and Phoebe hastily plan a surprise bridal party for Monica.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 7
programme.desc: At Uncle Philip's insistence, Will joins his prep school's poetry club, and he enlists Geoffrey's help when he must present a "poet" for a reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 4
programme.desc: The Impractical Jokers, Sal, Joe, Murr and Q meet after the show to talk about their favorite moments during the show not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous. It is a chance for the viewers to hear about all the behind the scenes mishaps and awkward scenes as well as see outtakes never seen before.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Ben Affleck writes, directs and stars in this crime drama/romance. Based on the novel The Prince of Thieves by Chuck Hogan, Affleck's film follows a career criminal (Affleck) who finds himself romantically involved with the manager of a bank (Rebecca Hall) he held up. A high-stakes love triangle develops when an equally infatuated FBI agent (Mad Men's Jon Hamm) arrives in the pursuit of justice. Stolen cash and a stolen heart lead to a relationship that could destroy this prince of thieves.

programme.title: Giant
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher Bick Benedict (Hudson) and dirt-poor cowboy Jett Rink (Dean) both woo Leslie Lynnton (Taylor) a beautiful young woman from Maryland who is new to Texas. She marries Benedict, but she is shocked by the racial bigotry of the White Texans against the local people of Mexican descent. Rink discovers oil on a small plot of land, and while he uses his vast, new wealth to buy all the land surrounding the Benedict ranch, the Benedict's disagreement over prejudice fuels conflict the runs across generations.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 2
programme.desc: Posing as a cashier, Michael makes a shopper's face appear on a milk carton and tries to convince her that she really is a missing person. Then, in a shipping store he has customers believing that impossible technology of the future has arrived, likea bowling ball that can be mailed in a flat box. Plus, he has a hotel guest questioning her identity when he swaps her ID, and stumps a valet when he does a disappearing act from his car.

programme.desc: Jane & the FBI investigate the death of a high-tech cartographer, who may have unearthed a spy ring before he died. Meanwhile, Rigsby & Van Pelt discover an alarming conspiracy.

programme.desc: The Impractical Jokers, Sal, Joe, Murr and Q meet after the show to talk about their favorite moments during the show not to mention the most uncomfortable, most embarrassing, most humiliating and most outrageous. It is a chance for the viewers to hear about all the behind the scenes mishaps and awkward scenes as well as see outtakes never seen before.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 1
programme.desc: Former boxer Brandon Bernier and his wife Lori target the best storage units in America and then to go to any lengths to get their hands on what's stashed inside.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 2
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go to war over a record producer's storage unit and unearth what could be a priceless piece of rock and roll history. Then, Jesse one ups the competition for a locker with a multi-thousand dollar payout. And later, a booby-trapped unit explodes, sending shockwaves through the storage facility.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 3
programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout. Security steps in, but can they separate the boys before the blood hits thefloor?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 4
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori look to cash in on their first big trip to New Orleans, but the locals are hungering for a fight. Then, the Taylor Brothers wage war to win a locker loaded with hunting and sporting equipment. What no one knows is that hidden beneaththe fishing poles, bear traps and camping gear is the score of a lifetime. And later, fireworks explode when a locker full of liquor and rare Mardi Gras masks spark a do or die bidding war.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 5
programme.desc: Back on the bayou, the buyers are ready to crack open the abandoned lockers and throw down some serious cash. Local legend FJ sees big dollar signs in old voodoo artifacts. Brandon and Lori unearth a rare find with a potentially priceless payout. Andall bets are off when a bidding war over endangered species taxidermy ends in a heated stand-off with the local authorities.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 6
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't. And later,vintage slot machines and poker tables send bidding through the roof. The closing price is stratospheric, but what's hidden from sight will be the ultimate payday for one lucky Storage Hunter.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 7
programme.desc: Jesse taunts Brandon and Lori in the hopes of instigating a fight and later unearths a ticking treasure. Then, seasoned local Victor throws down his bankroll for a trove of luxury goods, but are they actually knock-offs? And later, Brandon and Lori think they've hit the jackpot with a cache of firearms, but when Lori's gun accidentally goes off inside the locker, Brandon is caught in the crosshairs.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 8
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori return to Boston and square off against his former protege Wade. The bad blood may just erupt into a full-out brawl on the auction floor. Then, a former military hero goes all in on a locker that turns out to be hiding the ultimate score. And later, the contents of a unit spark an outrage among the buyers, but Brandon only sees dollar signs. Will he walk away or will this controversial cache crush his morals?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 9
programme.desc: The score of a lifetime is hidden in the back of what already appears to be a great locker, but when the bidding heats up, will our auction heroes have the cash to stay in this game? But first, Brandon and Lori face a shocking discovery when the contents of what look like an old retail store reveal their true identity. And later, some rare antiques fetch a fair price but further exploration of a hidden whale tusk could mean a windfall for one lucky storage hunter.

programme.title: Friends S7 15
programme.desc: Joey's character on a daytime drama becomes more prominent--to the chagrin of the show's diva star. Phoebe and Rachel argue over who should return a sexy man's misplaced cell phone to him.

programme.title: Friends S7 16
programme.desc: Chandler finds out who Monica really wanted to have sex with on the night they became lovers. Ross is furious after Rachel teaches Ben practical jokes.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 7)
programme.desc: Jesse and Stella’s band gig goes sour when they become the victims of a mass poisoning, becoming key witnesses in piecing together a deadly night at the pub.

programme.title: FBI: International (Season 4)
programme.desc: Headquartered in Budapest, the Federal Bureau of Investigation's International Fly Team travel the world with the mission of tracking and neutralizing threats against American citizens wherever they may be.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 8)
programme.desc: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shootings were politically motivated.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)
programme.desc: Danny joins forces with British investigator Christopher Granger (Jake Weber) to pursue a deadly international fugitive, and Erin faces pressure from her boss.

programme.desc: Jesse and Stella’s band gig goes sour when they become the victims of a mass poisoning, becoming key witnesses in piecing together a deadly night at the pub.

programme.desc: The brilliant yet unconventional attorney-turned-consultant ELSBETH returns for a third season with fresh cases, new characters and unexpected challenges for her and the 11th Precinct, led by her boss, Captain C.W. Wagner.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 8)
programme.desc: When two students are brutally attacked, 20-Squad contends with a possible honor killing. Meanwhile, Hondo and Nichelle have their first parenting dispute while searching for a suitable daycare.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Red Eye (Season 2)
programme.desc: The conspiracy is revealed; Hana, Brody and Delaney work together to deliver justice.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex (Season 7)
programme.desc: After a man is stabbed by an intruder who left no trace of a break-in, Rex’s senses reveal it was only a practice run for a scheme that goes much deeper.

programme.title: FBI: International (Season 4)
programme.desc: Headquartered in Budapest, the Federal Bureau of Investigation's International Fly Team travel the world with the mission of tracking and neutralizing threats against American citizens wherever they may be.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a U.S. Navy attaché is found dead with a USB lodged in his throat, the team tracks a killer believed to have ties to an international chess tournament in Sydney.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When a deadly secret resurfaces, five friends are stalked by a vengeful killer.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: Amidst the effervescence of Lucas’s wedding day, Tess plays with fire as she uses Jake’s undercover investigation to get close to the man she holds responsible for her mother’s death. In this epic finale, Tess must challenge everything she thought she knew about her past to finally learn the truth about the fire that killed her mother and separated her from Lucas. Meanwhile, after spontaneously reaching out to her estranged mother in 209, Sunny continues to push boundaries in an attempt to convince herself she is cured, first sleeping with Kye, and then inviting the wolf to her door in the form of her mother – with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: It's an ocean clean-up day! Super Shark recycles rubbish & the family builds a ball pit from recycled items!

programme.title: JJ's Bedtime & Daily Routines!
programme.desc: It's bedtime & daily routines! JJ builds a big boy bed, walks Bingo & has a backyard camping trip!

programme.title: A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of discovery with Twinkle! She makes music with toadstools & plays "Twinkle Says" with her friends!

programme.title: Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Learn gentle lessons with Twinkle! She learns about healthy fruit, animal sounds & sings sleepy songs!

programme.title: Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Learn with KiiYii! They sing about animal sounds, count the five little ducks & learn about road safety!

programme.title: Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Let's sing classic songs with KiiYii! They sing "Bingo" on the farm & "Two Little Dicky Birds"!

programme.title: A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's a playtime sing-along! Mia & Max play a fishing game, have a tea party & pretend to be puppies!

programme.title: Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: It's Twinkle's most magical moments! She becomes a train, a magic wand & brings fruits & veggies to life!

programme.title: Mindful Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies

programme.title: Twinkle's Calming Sounds
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies

programme.title: When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Everything goes hilariously wrong! Robot gets stuck in jelly & Princess Cat's castle fills with bubbles!

programme.title: Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Let's sing classic songs with KiiYii! They sing "Bingo" on the farm & "Two Little Dicky Birds"!

programme.title: The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: It's a teamwork & rescue special! Kii & Yii save Princess Cat from a well & from her out-of-control plane!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: It's time for sweet dreams! Mia learns calming yoga poses & Daddy shows her the "brush your teeth dance"!

programme.title: A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a day of food, play & learning! The kids have a teddy bear picnic & learn to say hello with a wave!

programme.title: Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Cody is a good brother & friend! He learns he's a big brother & welcomes his new sister Kendi home!

programme.title: JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: JJ's on a big animal adventure! He sings with the farm animals, meets a shark family & roars with dinosaurs!

programme.title: When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Baby Daniel is causing mayhem! He finds Arpo's remote control & makes a huge mess all over the kitchen!

programme.title: Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: It's sci-fi mayhem! Arpo gets stuck in zero gravity mode & accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray!

programme.title: Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: It's a creative day for the Minibods! Newt learns to slow down her drawing & Lulu tries to make a music video!

programme.title: Party Time, Win, Wait & Eat Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn important lessons! Pogo learns to compromise at a party & Newt learns not to give up!

programme.title: What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? He learns about the days of the week, Valentine's Day & the Spanish alphabet!

programme.title: Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Nina's on an adventure with friends! She pretends to be a soccer star & drives a tractor on the farm!

programme.title: Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: Let's get curious & creative! The mysterious Curiosity Crew appears & Blippi learns to mix colors with them!

programme.title: An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi's on an animal adventure! He learns why squirrels bury nuts, how bats see & how ducks float!

programme.title: Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering big questions! He learns how to brush teeth, why we sneeze & how spiders make their webs!

programme.title: Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: It's a creative farm adventure! Ella brings school to the barn, makes delicious jam & does some stargazing!

programme.title: Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: There are big surprises on the farm! Ella & Bee find a mysterious tortoise egg & meet new tiger twin friends!

programme.title: Let's Sing Our Favorite Songs!
programme.desc: Let's sing with JJ & his animal friends! They perform "Old Macdonald" & a play version of "Hey Diddle Diddle"!

programme.title: JJ's Fun Day of Sports & Play!
programme.desc: It's a fun day of sports & play! JJ plays soccer, learns body parts & goes on a ski trip with friends!

programme.title: Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's Orphle's big day of trouble! He makes colorful clones of himself & attacks his friends' cardboard castle!

programme.title: A Big Welcome for the New Magic Pets!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle welcome new Magic Pets! They meet a pet that grows jungles & one that makes juice pops!

programme.title: The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's Arpo vs. Squirrel! Arpo battles an army of squirrels & stops the pesky rodent from stealing a pie!

programme.title: Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo faces squirrel trouble & other wacky problems, like a ghost in the house & a malfunctioning music mode!

programme.title: A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a big day of rescues! The crew puts out a barn fire, saves a friend from an avalanche & fixes a clock!

programme.title: A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: It's a day of games & fun! The crew builds a crazy golf course & has a silly sandcastle competition!

programme.title: A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: It's a test of skill & teamwork! The Mechanicals fix Fiona on their own & Gecko's team wins a football game!

programme.title: Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: It's an epic rescue with Grandma Gecko! She helps stop a runaway car & changes lots of flat tires!

programme.title: A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: It's a day of Cody's favorite things! He pretends to be a dinosaur, forms a rock band & helps a lost duckling!

programme.title: JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: JJ shares his favorite stories! Hear the tales of "The Three Little Pigs" & "The Tortoise and the Hare"!

programme.title: Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: It's a day of clever fixes! The Sharksons fix a broken backpack & make a night light to help Grub sleep!

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: Less than 24 hours after being paroled, Danny Ocean handpicks a top-notch team of smooth operators to pocket $150 million in one night, in the most daring Las Vegas casino heist ever.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Have the time of your life with Meryl Streep and an all-star cast in this undeniably fun celebration of mothers and daughters, old friends and newly found family!

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars with Bradley Cooper, Zooey Deschanel, John Michael Higgins, and Terence Stamp in the story of a man who, with a single word, becomes a most extraordinary Yes Man.

programme.title: Cat People
programme.desc: Nastassja Kinski stars in this erotic fantasy about a beautiful young woman who discovers love for the first time, only to find that the explosive experience brings tragic consequences.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: 3D Nation
programme.desc: While a medical device company creates a 3D printed implant for a young man struggling with a concave chest, a doctor uses 3D printing to visualise and strategise for an upcoming complex surgery.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng’s friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.
